endpoints.description: Dangdang product comment API. After the search/list page ranking is stable, call this endpoint for each top product id instead of opening product pages just to find 好评率. browser_api_call compacts summary.goodRate, total comments, good/neutral/bad counts, default-good count, and average score.
strategy_notes: Use run_page_program extract_all on #search_nature_rg > ul > li after applying filters/sort to collect the top product ids, titles, prices, authors, and detail URLs.
For each top result, call this endpoint with productId=<id>, mainProductId=<id>, and pageIndex=1. This is a public same-site Dangdang API and should use fetch_mode=http.
Use goodRate directly as 好评率; append % if the compact result returns a numeric string. Do not navigate product detail pages just to verify 好评率.
If author is missing from the list item, use the product detail HTML adapter for that one item only; otherwise answer from list fields plus this comment summary.

endpoints.description: Dangdang product detail HTML. Use only for top items when list text lacks author/publisher/age evidence. browser_api_call compacts prodSpuInfo plus author, publisher, publish time, category path, and age hints from title/subtitle.
strategy_notes: Do not use product detail HTML for 好评率; use the comment/list API for that field.
Call this detail endpoint only for top products whose author, publisher, or age fields are missing from the list item.
If compact detail still lacks an optional field after one call, record 未显示 rather than opening the product page.
